title: aster alpigenus subsp. andersonii
intro: Aster alpigenus subsp. andersonii, also known as Mountain Aster, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the daisy family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Aster alpigenus subsp. andersonii include potential relief from pain and inflammation, as well as antioxidant and antimicrobial properties that may help to protect against various diseases. Herbal preparations of Mountain Aster are typically made from the leaves and flowers, which can be consumed as teas, infusions, or used in tinctures and salves to harness its medicinal properties.
